content.stem: Picture Description — Describe what you see in the photograph.
content.prompt: Look at this photograph of a park scene. Describe what you can see in the picture. Talk about the people, what they are doing, the place, and the weather.
content.sample_answer: In this picture, I can see a park on a sunny day. There are some trees and green grass. A family is having a picnic on the grass — a mother, a father, and two children. The children are playing with a ball. There is also an old man sitting on a bench and reading a newspaper. In the background, I can see a small lake with some ducks. The weather looks warm and sunny.
content.tips_zh: 描述图片时，先说整体场景（在哪里、什么天气），然后描述具体的人物和他们在做什么。使用 'there is/are'、'I can see' 等句型。注意使用现在进行时描述正在发生的动作。尽量描述图片的不同部分，不要只关注一个地方。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第三部分——图片描述。你需要观察一张照片并描述你看到的内容。考官会评估你描述场景、人物和活动的能力。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 3 — Picture Description. You need to observe a photograph and describe what you see. The examiner assesses your ability to describe scenes, people, and activities.
